rooms.title: Standard Room
rooms.description: Cozy and bright room with a queen bed, free wifi, and city views.

rooms.title: Deluxe Room
rooms.description: Spacious room with premium amenities, minibar, and workspace.

rooms.title: Suite
rooms.description: Large luxury suite with living area, balcony, and exclusive service.

rooms.title: Family Room
rooms.description: Comfortable family room with two double beds, a seating area, and child-friendly amenities.

rooms.title: Penthouse
rooms.description: Luxury penthouse with panoramic city views, private terrace, and premium concierge service.

reviews.title: Great stays
reviews.message: The room was clean, the staff were very kind, and breakfast was excellent.
reviews.author: Annas

reviews.title: Lovely location
reviews.message: Perfect spot for visiting the city. Quiet and comfortable, with helpful service.
reviews.author: Marcus

reviews.title: Fantastic staff
reviews.message: The reception team made our stay effortless. They recommended great local places.
reviews.author: Lily

reviews.title: Very comfy stay
reviews.message: Clean room, nice staff, and the breakfast was delicious.
reviews.author: Tom

reviews.title: Easy check-in
reviews.message: Check-in was quick, and the room felt fresh and modern. Great for a business trip.
reviews.author: Sofia

reviews.title: Perfect weekend stay
reviews.message: The rooftop breakfast and friendly staff made our weekend special. Highly recommend.
reviews.author: Noah

reviews.title: Excellent Stay
reviews.message: The hotel was amazing! Great service and beautiful rooms.
reviews.author: Alice Johnson

services.name: Gym Access

services.name: Library Lounge
services.description: Quiet reading room with books, magazines, and board games for guests.

services.name: Spa Treatments
